description.plain: A natural drink blend of ginger, garlic, lemon, and fruit vinegar for immune support, digestion, and overall wellness.

unique_selling_points: Combines three natural juices and fruit vinegar in a gentle, additive-free formula inspired by traditional Chinese medicine.
metadata.top_features:
Contains ginger, garlic, and lemon for natural immune support and anti-inflammatory benefits
Fermented to reduce irritating properties, making it gentle on the stomach
No additives, preservatives, artificial colors, or flavors for a pure natural taste
Supports digestion, metabolism, and healthy skin
Suitable for daily consumption and easy to adjust serving size based on individual needs
metadata.tech_specs:
Serving Size: 50 ml per bottle
Packaging: 6 bottles per box
Key Ingredients: Water, monk fruit, vinegar, garlic, ginger, lemon, millet sprout, malt, polydextrose
Origin: China
Dietary Preferences: No preservatives, no artificial colors, no artificial flavors, vegetarian

description.plain: 50ml x 6Bottles / Box Suggested Directions: Take one bottle 1-2 time(s) daily. Maximum 3 servings (3 bottles x 50ml) a day. Shake before drinking When to consume: Base on your own personal physique, life and eating habits, adjust the drinking time according to your own needs, and you can get more characteristic benefits. Drinking before breakfast helps to speed up gastrointestinal motility and promote metabolism; Drinking in the afternoon helps to enhance digestion, eliminate stagnation and aid detoxification, and is good for anti-fatigue; Drinking before bedtime can help relieve depression and fall asleep, keep body fit and lose weight, and beautify the skin. *Best served chilled Cautions: This product uses nature plants as raw materials, sedimentation is a natural phenomenon. Storage Condition: Keep in cool, ventilated and dry place. Pure natural with no additives Production strictly supervised under HACCP food manufacturer

50ml x 6Bottles / Box Suggested Directions: Take one bottle 1-2 time(s) daily. Maximum 3 servings (3 bottles x 50ml) a day. Shake before drinking When to consume: Base on your own personal physique, life and eating habits, adjust the drinking time according to your own needs, and you can get more characteristic benefits. Drinking before breakfast helps to speed up gastrointestinal motility and promote metabolism; Drinking in the afternoon helps to enhance digestion, eliminate stagnation and aid detoxification, and is good for anti-fatigue; Drinking before bedtime can help relieve depression and fall asleep, keep body fit and lose weight, and beautify the skin. *Best served chilled Cautions: This product uses nature plants as raw materials, sedimentation is a natural phenomenon. Storage Condition: Keep in cool, ventilated and dry place. Pure natural with no additives Production strictly supervised under HACCP food manufacturer Highlight: May assist in: Boost immunity Reduce hypertension, hyperglycemia, hyperlipidemia and cholesterol levels Prevent cold hands and feet Soften blood vessels and promote heart health Lubricate intestine and facilitate bowel movement. Keep body slim and beautify the skin Improve and innovate while following the ancient prescription Originated from an ancient recipe for disease prevention and anti-inflammation, "3 Plus 1" is made from three kinds of juices (ginger juice, garlic juice, lemon juice) plus fruit vinegar. Such products have already been circulating in China and India regions for a very long time, and are widely used in health care for disease prevention and immunity enhancement. The "3 Plus 1" produced by our company follows the principle of "Medicine and Food from the Same Source". Base on the traditional production, we innovatively increased the fermentation process in order to enhance the therapeutic effects of ginger, garlic, lemon, and vinegar. We also adopted the principle of individual processing and fermentation, which greatly reduced the irritating properties of ginger, garlic, and vinegar to the stomach, creating a gentle yet refreshing drink. Suitable for People who: Concerned about cardiovascular and cerebrovascular health Concerned about hypertension, hyperglycemia, hyperlipidemia and cholesterol levels People care about spleen and gastrointestinal health Focus on improving immunity and promoting health Concerned about healthy diet but lack of exercise Pay attention to losing weight and beautifying skin Ingredients: Water, Monk Fruit Vinegar, Garlic, Ginger, Lemon, Millet Sprout, Malt, Polydextrose Origin: China

products.title: Tong Xue Ling (Ginger Garlic Lemon Juice) and Products

description.plain: A traditional beverage blend of ginger, garlic, lemon, honey, and apple cider vinegar for natural wellness support.

unique_selling_points: Combines five natural ingredients with no artificial additives, offering a holistic wellness drink certified for quality and safety.
metadata.top_features:
Contains ginger, garlic, lemon, honey, and apple cider vinegar for a balanced blend of natural ingredients
No artificial flavors, colors, or preservatives for a clean, natural taste
Rich in vitamin C and antioxidants to support immune health and skin
May help reduce fatigue, numbness, and high blood pressure naturally
Certified halal and free from hormone additives for peace of mind
metadata.tech_specs:
Serving Size: 15-30 ml per time
Package Size: 400 ml
Ingredients: Ginger, black garlic, lemon, apple cider vinegar, honey
Dietary Preferences: No artificial colors, no artificial flavors, no preservatives, halal
Certifications: SGS, AVA (Singapore), Mesti (Malaysia)
Package Type: Bottle

media.alt_text: Tong Xue Ling (Ginger Garlic Lemon Juice) and Products

variants.title: Tong Xue Ling (Ginger Garlic Lemon Juice) and Products

description.plain: Tong Xue Ling 通血灵 (Ginger Garlic Lemon Juice) Tong Xue Ling (Ginger Garlic Lemon Juice) is a traditional recipe made from 5 kinds of natural ingredients : ginger, garlic, lemon with apple cider vinegar & honey. No artificial flavors and colorings, no preservatives or other chemical addictive. 通血灵(姜蒜柠檬汁)采用纯天然的大蒜，姜，苹果醋，柠檬和蜂蜜制作而成，不含防腐剂、色素、糖精或任何化学添加剂。味道酸酸甜甜有点辣，口感极佳，每天一小匙，健康又保健~ Ginger : Relieve body inflammation, headache, pain, swelling, relieve joint pain, physical fitness Garlic : Contain Allicin, which is super antioxidant, promote blood circulation, anti-bacterial antiinflammatory disinfection Lemon Juice : Rich in vitamin C flavonoids, citric acid helps to remove body waste, reduce pigmentation Honey : Rich in amino acids, vitamins, minerals, fat burning, antibacterial and anti-inflammatory, nourish the skin Apple cider vinegar : Helps in fat burning, regulate blood sugar, regulate the body pH 生姜： 缓解身体发炎症状、舒缓头痛疼痛肿胀、缓解关节疼痛、强身健体 大蒜： 大蒜辣素 allicin 超级抗氧化素、促进血液循环、抗菌消炎消毒 柠檬： 富含维生素 C 类黄酮、柠檬酸 citric acid 清除体内废物、减少色素沉淀 蜂蜜： 丰富氨基酸、维生素、矿物质、脂肪燃烧、抗菌与抗炎、滋养肌肤 苹果醋： 帮助脂肪燃烧、调节血糖、调节体内 pH 值 Safety Standard & Quality Assurance: Tong Xue Ling does not contain any artificial flavour, colouring, saccharin, hormone, preservative or any other chemical additives. Product certifications issued by including SGS (the world’s leading inspection company), AVA (Agri-Food & Veterinary Authority of Singapore No: V-021-2015-06-01094) The company has Halal certification, Mesti certification,and has been registered by the ministry of health of Malaysia ( No: J06P1150420-016615) 食品安全与品质保证: 通血灵不含防腐剂、色素、糖精、激素或任何化学添加剂。 产品质量标准认证包括了SGS (国际检验和认证机构)和 AVA (新加坡农粮兽医局 No: V-021-2015-06-01094) 公司拥有清真认证、MeSTI认证，马来西亚卫生部食品安全与质量注册证 ( No: J06P1150420-016615) The efficiency: We have lots of positive’s product testimonials, and it is still growing… Feedback from our appreciative customers, the product also does helps in sorts of health problems like: panting, constipation, numbness in hands & legs, insomnia, prostate… etc. and all these problems maybe caused by cardiovascular blockage. 功效: 我们拥有许多真实案例的产品见证, 且还在持续增长中. 从顾客的正面反馈中我们得知, 通血灵还对一些的看起来无关的小毛病有所帮助，比如: 气喘、便秘、手脚麻痹、失眠、 前列腺、等等。。而这些小毛病可能是因心血管阻塞所造成的。 Serving Suggestion: 1 spoon(15ml) per serving, twice a day in the morning and evening. It tastes even better without mixing with water. Take after meal if you have gastric problem. Shake well before consume. 建议喝法：早晚各一汤匙(15ml)，不掺水喝更可口！胃酸患者建议餐后食用。喝前请摇均。体质虚寒者一汤匙掺温水喝 Storage: Store in cool dry place. Avoid direct sunlight. 储存：置放阴凉干燥处，避免阳光照射 Serving : 750ml GBT Black Garlic Extract 文冬生姜黑蒜精华活性酵素 Malaysia Benefit : －Improving heart condition －Skin Whitening －Reduce Fatigue －Reduce Numbness －Reduce high blood pressure －Prevent Risk of high attack －Reduce cholesterol level －Prevention of cardiovascular blockage －Improving digestion Ingredients: Bentong Ginger, Black Garlic, Lemon, Apple Cider Vinegar, Honey Direction to use:15-30ml per time in the morning before meal. Shake well before drink 400ml

products.title: Pure Apple Cider Vinegar Drink with Ginger and Garlic

description.plain: A potent organic drink blend of apple cider vinegar, ginger, and garlic for digestive, immune, and detox support.

unique_selling_points: Combines certified organic apple cider vinegar, ginger, and garlic for multi-benefit wellness support.
metadata.top_features:
Digestive support: Stimulates digestive enzymes for improved gut health and relief from discomfort
Immune system boost: Antioxidants and antimicrobial properties strengthen the body's defenses
Detoxification: Apple cider vinegar aids in cleansing and supports liver function
Weight management: Promotes fullness, stabilizes blood sugar, and boosts metabolism
Heart health: Garlic supports cholesterol, blood pressure, and cardiovascular wellness
metadata.tech_specs:
Ingredients: Certified organic apple juice (4-8% acidity), organic ginger, organic garlic
Vinegar Drink Variety: Shrub
Dietary Preferences: Organic
Flavor: Apple, Ginger
Brand: Aarshaveda

variants.title: Pure Apple Cider Vinegar Drink with Ginger and Garlic

description.plain: Product Description: Aarshaveda’s Pure Apple Cider Vinegar Drink with Ginger and Garlic is a potent elixir crafted to invigorate your senses and boost your well-being. Made from the finest ingredients, this concoction packs a punch of flavor and health benefits. Product Benefits: 1. Digestive Support: The combination of apple cider vinegar, ginger, and garlic aids in digestion by stimulating the production of digestive enzymes, promoting gut health, and alleviating digestive discomfort. 2. Immune System Boost: Packed with antioxidants and antimicrobial properties, this drink helps strengthen the immune system, protecting the body against infections and illnesses. 3. Detoxification: Apple cider vinegar acts as a natural detoxifier, helping to cleanse the body of toxins and impurities, while ginger and garlic support liver function, aiding in the elimination of waste from the body. 4. Weight Management: Incorporating this drink into your daily regimen may support weight loss efforts by promoting feelings of fullness, stabilizing blood sugar levels, and boosting metabolism. 5. Heart Health: The components of this drink, particularly garlic, are known for their heart-healthy properties. They help lower cholesterol levels, regulate blood pressure, and improve overall cardiovascular health. Ingredients: It consist of Certified organic apple juice brewed to 4.8% acidity & Organic Ginger and Garlic. How to Use: Start your day by mixing 1-2 tablespoons of Pure Apple Cider Vinegar Drink with Ginger and Garlic into a glass of warm water. Sip it slowly on an empty stomach for a refreshing and energizing boost.

unique_selling_points: No added sugar, organic, and a blend of ginger, mint, and vitamins for holistic wellness.
metadata.top_features:
Cold-pressed superfood elixir delivers concentrated wellness benefits for daily use
Contains ginger and mint for natural digestive support and relief from heartburn, reflux, and bloating
Rich in gingerol and essential vitamins to promote immune health and inflammation relief
No added sugar, preservatives, artificial colors, or flavors for a clean, natural beverage
Versatile consumption options: drink neat, mix with water, or create cocktails

Volume: 500 ml
Ingredients: Water (38%), ginger (lemon lime), mint, herbs and spices (organic origin)
Shelf Life: 60 days refrigerated after opening

Package Type: Glass bottle

description.plain: Elevate Your Well-being with Our Ginger and Mint Concentrate. Discover the daily wellness benefits of ginger and mint, expertly blended in our cold-pressed superfood elixir. This potent concoction is brimming with vitamins, gingerol, and the soothing properties of mint, offering you: Gentle Digestion: Ease discomfort from heartburn, reflux, and bloating while promoting digestive health. Inflammation Relief: Combat inflammation, making it an excellent choice for arthritis. Boost Immunity: Take 20-30ml neat to alleviate hangover, indigestion, or when feeling under the weather, strengthening your immune system. Elevate your daily well-being with the harmonious blend of ginger and mint – your wellness ally in every sip. A refrigerated shelf life of 60 days after opening, ensures long-lasting freshness. Ingredients: Water, 38% Ginger*, Lemon*, Lime*, 3% Mint*, Herbs, and Spices* (*Organic Origin).

Elevate Your Well-being with Our Ginger and Mint Concentrate. Discover the daily wellness benefits of ginger and mint, expertly blended in our cold-pressed superfood elixir. This potent concoction is brimming with vitamins, gingerol, and the soothing properties of mint, offering you: Gentle Digestion: Ease discomfort from heartburn, reflux, and bloating while promoting digestive health. Inflammation Relief: Combat inflammation, making it an excellent choice for arthritis. Cholesterol Management: Support heart health by regulating cholesterol levels. Enjoy in Three Ways: Detox and Hydrate: Mix 20-30ml in hot water, add fresh mint and a slice of lemon for a revitalizing, hydrating detox. Refreshing Sip: Combine 20ml with tonic water, soda water, or sparkling water, on the rocks or off, for a delightful beverage. Boost Immunity: Take 20-30ml neat to alleviate hangover, indigestion, or when feeling under the weather, strengthening your immune system. A refrigerated shelf life of 60 days after opening, ensures long-lasting freshness. Ingredients: Water, 38% Ginger*, Lemon*, Lime*, 3% Mint* Herbs and Spices* (*Organic Origin).

Includes 130,000 mg turmeric per litre to support gut health and immunity

Embrace the daily advantages of ginger and turmeric, known to: Enhance Digestion: Promote healthy digestion and gut comfort. Combat Inflammation: Lower inflammation, especially beneficial for arthritis. Manage Cholesterol: Support heart health by regulating cholesterol levels. With a shelf life of up to 60 days after opening, store in the fridge for lasting freshness. Ingredients: Water, 47% Ginger*, Lemon*, Lime*, 13% Turmeric*, 10% Cane Sugar*, Black Pepper*, Herbs and Spices* (*Organic Origin). Elevate your daily wellness routine with the wholesome power of ginger and turmeric – your daily wellness elixir in a bottle. Ginger: 470,000 mg Turmeric: 130,000 mg

media.alt_text: Ginger, Ginseng, Turmeric Shot & Ginger Brew – 54 pcs

variants.title: Ginger, Ginseng, Turmeric Shot & Ginger Brew – 54 pcs

description.plain: Offer content: Each Ginger Shot delivers a zesty, refreshing taste that supports digestive comfort and daily vitality ,30 ml × 16 BPA-free bottles. Ginseng Shots help sharpen focus and promote physical vitality – 30 ml × 16 BPA free bottle. Turmeric Shots offer calming and anti-inflammatory support – 30 ml × 16 BPA free bottle. Ginger Brew provides daily refreshment with citrus and herbal notes – 330 ml × 6. This variety pack is crafted to promote vitality, immunity, and digestive comfort , a practical choice for today’s health-conscious lifestyle. Al Malaky Royal presents this curated combo of natural wellness drinks featuring three functional shot formulas and a sparkling ginger beverage all made from premium, natural ingredients. The Ginger Shot blends fresh ginger juice, sidr honey, and lemon juice to help aid digestion, boost metabolism, and ease stomach discomfort naturally. The Ginseng Shot is made with pure Korean red ginseng extract to enhance mental clarity, support circulation, and naturally strengthen the immune system. Turmeric Shot features fresh turmeric, ginger, sidr honey, lemon, and mandarin offering anti-inflammatory properties that promote balance and physical comfort. Completing the combo is our fizzy Ginger Brew: a naturally refreshing drink made without preservatives or additives, rich in antioxidants from citrus and ginger, ideal for hydration and energy at any time. This pack is a smart, complete solution for energizing your daily routine and embracing wellness in every sip. You can take up to 3 shots daily

description.plain: Offer content: Ginger Shot 30Ml - 32 Pc in BPA Free bottle Ginger Brew 330Ml - 6 Pc This combination is an ideal choice for those seeking a natural alternative to artificial beverages with a rich taste and functional benefits. This Al Malaky Royal set combines concentrated ginger shots and fizzy ginger drinks in a versatile collection suitable for everyday use. The ginger shot blends fresh ginger juice, sidr honey, and lemon juice helping support digestion, soothe the stomach, and stimulate physical and mental energy. The sparkling ginger drink, made from natural cane juice, ginger, and lemon, offers refreshing hydration, rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties. It’s a wholesome alternative to sweetened or artificial drinks. This set integrates smoothly into any daily routine at home, at work, or on the go representing Al Malaky Royal’s commitment to quality and natural wellness.

media.alt_text: Ginger Drinking Vinegar - Stone Hollow Farmstead

description.plain: Your mouth might start to water before you even pour your first shot. Your tongue will probably start doing a happy dance as you crack the seal on the bottle. Your brain knows what’s coming, even before your tastebuds do. That is the power of this ginger-infused apple cider vinegar. Our organic apple cider vinegar base gets its peppery jolt from organic ginger root grown on our Harpersville farm. Not content to stop there, we layer in our signature lemongrass hydrosol, honey, lemon and red pepper which gives this vinegar a balance that is only complemented by the addition of garlic, cinnamon, clove, star anise and cardamom. Digestive Relief & Anti-inflammatory Create healthy beverages, signature cocktails and non-alcohol mocktails with Stone Hollow Farmstead’s infused drinking vinegars. Concentrated for health benefits and will mix into creative cocktails and sodas wonderfully. Made with raw organic apple cider vinegar. Made with locally sourced or Stone Hollow grown ingredients. Self-preserving, shelf stable, non-GMO, gluten free, vegetarian. Made in small batches with fresh seasonal ingredients. Ginger Drinking Vinegar benefits: Rich in citral Reduces inflammation Promotes healthy digestion Good source of gingerols Boosts Immunity DIRECTIONS | Add one ounce to six ounces of still or sparkling water once or twice per day Take a shot (about 1-2 Tablespoons) straight up, Dilute with warm water, juice or apple cider. Use in Bloody Marys’. Use as a hangover cure. FLAVOR PROFILE | Hot and zesty, yet sweet and warm, as aromatic as flavorful TASTING NOTES | Earthy and spice-driven; ginger is omnipresent here, but you’ll get notes of garlic, lemongrass and honey as well. KITCHEN PAIRINGS | Ginger is a widely used ingredient so think of using it anywhere you’d use the spice itself to give acidity and greater depth to a dish. Swap vinegar in a salad dressing for ginger vinegar, add to fried rice, drizzle over steamed veggies, use as a marinade for tofu, meat, etc., add to soup or chili. BAR PAIRINGS | Gin and Vodka friendly; use in Vodka/Gin & Tonics, carbonated beverages, sparkling wine. Ginger Drinking Vinegar Ingredients | Fresh Hawaiian ginger root, organic cider vinegar, raw honey, lemongrass hydrosol, fresh lemon juice, cracked pepper, garlic, clove, cinnamon, star anise

media.alt_text: Ginger Drinking Vinegar - Stone Hollow Farmstead
